svg.title: Personal Finance schema overview
svg.desc: Orthogonal ERD overview derived from docs/schema.md. Shared entities are repeated across panels to keep relationships straight and readable.
svg.text: Source: docs/schema.md. Shared entities are intentionally repeated across panels so the connectors can stay orthogonal and easy to scan.
Mermaid is convenient for markdown, but Graphviz DOT or PlantUML is a better source format when you need stable right-angle routing.
Auth tables plus admin-controlled configuration and audit records.
Operational model for user balances, budgeting jars, and allocation flows.
Confirmed transactions, import jobs, and review drafts before commit.
User planning and communication domain. Nullable links are dashed.
Suggested source format for future edits: Graphviz DOT with orthogonal routing, then export to SVG for docs.
